title: Truthy & falsy
description: The seven falsy values and everything else.

questions.explanation: The STRING '0' has length > 0, so it's truthy. The number 0 is falsy.
An empty array is an object — objects are always truthy.

questions.prompt: Which is NOT a falsy value?
questions.explanation: The STRING 'false' is truthy. Falsy: false, 0, -0, 0n, '', null, undefined, NaN.
